---
title: "🎲 Autoencodeurs et Modèles Variationnels (VAE)"
part: "🎲 Autoencodeurs et Modèles Variationnels (VAE)"
bibliography: bibliography.bib
---

{{< include _51_autoencoder.qmd >}}
{{< include _52_vae.qmd >}}

{{< include _54_reparametrisation.qmd >}}
{{< include _55_vqvae.qmd >}}
{{< include _56_synthese.qmd >}}
<!-- DYNAMIC_INCLUDES_END -->
